author.description: Fox News National Correspondent Dallas based | Syracuse Alum🍊| NYC raised 🌆

tweets.text:
#FIRSTONFOX: The driver of a hit and run that killed a Fort Bend County Deputy is an illegal migrant who has been arrested. Last month, Deputy Kenneth Lewis stopped to help a stranded motorist on I-10 in Houston, when he was hit and killed by a driver who fled. The FBI Houston has been assisting Houston Police in trying to find driver 

DHS identifies the illegal migrant as Dennis Arguello-Acosta and said an anonymous tip to the FBI and law enforcement agencies led to him. He is now in ICE custody.

author.description: Fox News National Correspondent Dallas based | Syracuse Alum🍊| NYC raised 🌆

tweets.text:
This is what it looks like IAH in Houston with TSA lines consistently around 4 hours long. The lines stretch down multiple levels to the basement where the airports subway system is, then loops around outside and back in the terminal. 

“This is unconscionable, Congress should be embarrassed, this is what you're doing with taxpayer money,” one traveler told Fox.

author.description: Fox News National Correspondent Dallas based | Syracuse Alum🍊| NYC raised 🌆

tweets.text:
NEW: ICE Houston announces the arrest of 277 illegal migrants in just 2 weeks including child predators, murderers, & drug traffickers 

This comes as Houston’s city council is voting tomorrow whether to reverse a recent ordinance it passed which limits police cooperation with ICE.  Gov. Abbott froze $110 million in public safety grants for Houston  and said it will be pulled if they don’t revoke the ordinance tomorrow because it violates an agreement with the state.

“If these measures are implemented to limit that cooperation there will be immediate impacts to public safety, national security, and border security,” ICE Enforcement and Removal Operations Houston acting Field Office Director Paul McBride said.”

Among those arrested this month, according to ICE:

1. Haydee Mercado-Rodriguez, a criminal illegal alien and MS-13 gang member from El Salvador, who was convicted and sentenced to 228 years for two counts of aggravated homicide and once count each of aggravated extortion, and participation in a terrorist organization before she fled to the U.S. In 2024, the Biden administration recklessly released her  into the U.S. She was arrested April 9

2. Minh Duy Tong Nguyen, a convicted murderer from Vietnam, with a final order of removal from over 25 years ago. Nguyen was arrested April 16

3. Carlos Carmona-Palomo, wanted for homicide in Mexico & illegally entered the U.S. three times and has been convicted twice for drug possession and once each for sexual assault, carrying a prohibited weapon, illegal reentry, and larceny. He was arrested April 6 & then deported 

4. Luis Hernandez Martinez, a twice-deported criminal illegal migrant and convicted murderer from Mexico, who was convicted of murder in Upshur County, Texas, in 2003, and has also been convicted of illegal entry. He was arrested April 9 & then deported
